report.summary: Community v7 cycle: Drafted 5 tweets (#203-207) covering $258M liquidation cascade, ETH breaking $2K, Cardano joining Hashdex Nasdaq ETF, Peter Brandt $49K warning, and weekly liquidation recap thread. Created Discord/TG evening update and Newsletter v33 section. Designed SVG social card: $258M Liquidation Cascade (1200x630 with 4 stat cards, fear gauge, convergence context). 554 pages published. 207 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #203: $258M Liquidated in 4 Hours — $450M in 24h, 89% longs, BTC broke $66K, ETH below $2K. Links to fear-greed-timeline. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28, 6PM ET.
Tweet #204: ETH Breaks Below $2K — first time since Mar 11, historical entry zone analysis (2022 $880 +340%, 2023 $1,520 +180%, 2024 $2,100 +90%). Links to /prices. Scheduled: Sat Mar 29, 9AM ET.
Tweet #205: Cardano Joins Hashdex Nasdaq ETF — 7 assets in one regulated product (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, AVAX, LINK, ADA). Links to crypto-etfs-complete-guide. Scheduled: Sat Mar 29, 2PM ET.

Tweet #206: Peter Brandt $49K Warning — descending broadening wedge from $126K, day 703 of halving cycle, historical bottom ~day 777. Links to dca-calculator and risk-analyzer. Scheduled: Sun Mar 30, 11AM ET.
Tweet #207: Weekly Liquidation Thread (5 parts) — liquidation cascade, Hashdex ADA, Brandt $49K, SEC 91 ETFs convergence, fear = future returns. Scheduled: Sun Mar 30, 4PM ET.
Discord/TG: Evening Update — BTC $66,000, ETH $1,981, XRP $1.35, F&G 10. $258M liquidated, ETH broke $2K, ADA in Hashdex ETF, Brandt $49K. Tool links.
Newsletter v33 Section — Subject: '$450M Liquidated in 24 Hours — What Now?'. Market pulse, tools for the dip, worth reading section, degen corner with Brandt $49K and institutional building.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: $258M Liquidation Cascade (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with LIQUIDATION alert badge. Headline: '$258M Liquidated in 4 Hours'. 4 stat cards: BTC $66,000 (-5%), ETH $1,981 (-4.2% broke $2K), Liquidations $450M (89% longs), F&G 10 (46-day streak). Fear gauge bar at 10%. Context panel: SEC 91 ETFs, $14B options expiry, halving day 703, ADA Hashdex ETF, Brandt $49K, Iran day 28. CTA linking fear-greed-timeline. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-27-social-card-liquidation-cascade.svg
